nodes.categoryHTML:
Platforms and Software Resources

Urban Planning Tools and Platforms
nodes.itemHTML: • ArcGIS Urban - ArcGIS Urban enables planners and design professionals to publish living plans and collaborate across teams with a web-based 3D application that supports scenario planning and impact assessment.

• Zeek: (formerly Bro) is an open source software platform that provides compact, high-fidelity transaction logs, file content, and fully customized output to analysts, from the smallest home office to the largest, fastest research and commercial networks. From the FAQ:
• Arkime Arkime (formerly Moloch) is a large scale, open source, indexed packet capture and search tool.

• Model Maker - A transfer learning library that simplifies the process of training, evaluation and deployment for TensorFlow Lite models (support: Image Classification, Object Detection, Text Classification, BERT Question Answer, Audio Classification, Recommendation etc.; API reference).
• Synthstars926 - Open Source test data generator.
• Threat Busstars227 - Threat intelligence dissemination layer to connect security tools through a distributed publish/subscribe message broker.
• Beekeeper Studiostars11.7k - Open Source SQL Editor and Database Manager with a privacy commitment in their mission statement.
• golem - A framework for building production-grade Shiny apps.
• httpgdstars232 - Asynchronous http server graphics device for R.
• corporaexplorer - Dynamic exploration of text collections
• L3MON4D3/LuaSnipstars1.4k - A snippet engine for Neovim written in Lua.
• winston0410/range-highlight.nvimstars128 - An extremely lightweight plugin (~ 120loc) that highlights ranges you have entered in commandline.

• nacro90/numb.nvimstars351 - Peek lines in a non-obtrusive way.
• mhartington/formatter.nvimstars645 - A format runner for Neovim written in Lua.

• Splunk App for Corda - Splunk official integration app for Corda monitoring.
• Conveyal's gtfs-validatorstars37 - A Java-based GTFS validator based on the OneBusAway GTFS Modules, runs in Java and is faster than the Google provided one.
• Conveyal's gtfs-libstars52 - Conveyal's successor to their own gtfs-validatorstars37, a Java-based library for loading and saving GTFS feeds of arbitrary size with disk-backed storage.
• Google's feedValidator - Google-supported Python-based GTFS validator.
• GTFS Meta-Validator (hosted by Omni) - A web-based GTFS validator that runs both the Google Python feedValidator and Conveyal's gtfs-validatorstars37 on uploaded GTFS files.

• gtfs-validator-apistars1 - This Python package is a thin wrapper around MobilityData/gtfs-validatorstars130 that handles intermediate files produced and finds gtfs-validator's output file so it can be given a specific name or returned as a string.
• MobilityData's gtfs-validatorstars130 - A open-source GTFS validator canonically following the GTFS spec implemented in Java licensed under Apache v2.0 maintained by MobilityData.
• Reflect GTFS Validator (hosted by Foursquare ITP) - Transit schedule and GTFS validation platform by Foursquare ITP that includes a free, web-based GTFS validator based on gtfs-libstars52.
• GForge — Project Management & Issue Tracking toolset for complex projects with self-premises and SaaS options. SaaS free plan offers first 5 users free & free for Open Source Projects.

• Paiza — Develop Web apps in Browser without having the need to setup anything. Free Plan offers 1 server with 24 hours lifetime and 4 hours running time per day with 2 CPU cores, 2 GB RAM and 1 GB storage.
• Golem Network Stats - Statistics tracking tasks and provider resource utilization in the Golem Network.
• Golem Stats backendstars1 - Backend of the Golem Network Statistics page including API endpoint URLs.
• yqstars6.6k - yq is a portable command-line YAML processor
• shfmtstars5.1k - A shell parser, formatter, and interpreter with bash support; includes shfmt

• Wemvula - A visual transformation platform that provides the situational awareness to make sense of your interconnected web of needs, ideas, service components, supply contracts and change activities.
• Flamestars3k - Flame is self-hosted startpage for your server. Easily manage your apps and bookmarks with built-in editors. MIT Nodejs
• Testing JavaScript Applications - A complete guide for JavaScript testing tools and techniques.
• Foodsoft - Web-based software to manage a non-profit food coop (product catalog, ordering, accounting, job scheduling). (Source Codestars272) AGPL-3.0 Ruby
• juntagrico - Management platform for community gardens and vegetable cooperatives. (Source Codestars30) LGPL-3.0 Python
• Local Food Nodes - Your open source platform for peoples driven local food markets and CSA. (Source Code) MIT PHP

• HC-12 - SERIAL - Wireless serial transceiver module - Intro blog post - githubstars1 -
